item.text:
I couldn’t sort out login because this workspace doesn’t contain any login/auth implementation to modify. The repo currently has the oh-my-brain harness, KT code, a demo rate limiter, tests, and logs; `rg` found no app routes, UI, auth handlers, user model, session middleware, or login form.

Also, this session is read-only, so even if the target file existed I would not be able to patch it here. Send the app path or the relevant login files, and I can take it from there.

--- Learning check ---
**Concept check: scoping a vague fix**
What one file, behavior, or failing test would make “sort out the login stuff” actionable?
A good answer names the target and how you’d verify it.
